import fs from 'node:fs';
const file = 'client/src/styles/panels-drawer.css';
let css = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8');
css = css.replace(/\/\* Redesigned settings\/archive surfaces: ink frame \+ warm paper cards\. \*\/[\s\S]*?(?=\n\.setting-row \{)/, '');
css = css.replace(/\/\* ===== OpenCode-inspired austere mono settings\/archive redesign ===== \*\/[\s\S]*?(?=\/\* ===== End drawer redesign 2026 ===== \*\/)/, '');
const finalBlock = `/* ===== Minimal mono settings/archive surfaces ===== */
.drawer.drawer-settings,
.drawer.drawer-archive {
  --panel-canvas: #fdfcfc;
  --panel-ink: #201d1d;
  --panel-body: #424245;
  --panel-muted: #646262;
  --panel-soft: #f8f7f7;
  --panel-line: rgba(15, 0, 0, 0.14);
  --panel-strong: #201d1d;
  --panel-invert: #fdfcfc;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: none;
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  background: var(--panel-canvas);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  box-shadow: none;
  font-family: "Berkeley Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
}

[data-theme="dark"] .drawer.drawer-settings,
[data-theme="dark"] .drawer.drawer-archive {
  --panel-canvas: #201d1d;
  --panel-ink: #fdfcfc;
  --panel-body: #d7d0d0;
  --panel-muted: #9a9898;
  --panel-soft: #302c2c;
  --panel-line: rgba(253, 252, 252, 0.16);
  --panel-strong: #fdfcfc;
  --panel-invert: #201d1d;
}

.drawer.drawer-settings *,
.drawer.drawer-archive * {
  font-family: inherit;
}

.drawer-settings .drawer-subheader,
.drawer-archive .drawer-subheader {
  height: 54px;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0 16px;
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  background: var(--panel-canvas);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  backdrop-filter: none;
}

.drawer-settings .drawer-subheader strong,
.drawer-archive .drawer-subheader strong {
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.drawer-settings .icon-button,
.drawer-archive .icon-button {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  background: transparent;
}

.drawer-settings .icon-button:active,
.drawer-archive .icon-button:active {
  background: var(--panel-soft);
}

.settings-view-redesign,
.archive-page {
  min-height: calc(100dvh - 54px);
  padding: 28px 18px 52px;
  background: var(--panel-canvas);
}

.settings-hero,
.archive-hero {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 0 0 24px;
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.settings-hero::after,
.archive-hero::after,
.settings-card-inline .archive-box-entry::before,
.archive-thread-row::after {
  display: none;
}

.settings-kicker,
.archive-hero-kicker {
  display: block;
  width: auto;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: lowercase;
}

.settings-hero h2,
.archive-hero h2 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.25;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.settings-hero p,
.archive-hero p {
  max-width: none;
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--panel-body);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.settings-hero strong {
  justify-self: start;
  margin-top: 6px;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-strong);
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: var(--panel-invert);
  background: var(--panel-strong);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.settings-card,
.archive-list-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 40px;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.settings-card .drawer-heading {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 12px 0;
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: none;
}

.settings-card .drawer-heading::before {
  content: "+ ";
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  font-weight: 400;
}

.theme-setting-compact,
.diagnostics-card,
.settings-card-inline .archive-box-entry,
.archive-thread-row,
.archive-page .archive-empty {
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.theme-setting-compact {
  padding: 0 0 16px;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-setting-title,
.diagnostics-card .setting-row {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 12px 0 8px;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-setting-title span,
.diagnostics-card .setting-row span,
.settings-card-inline .archive-box-entry span {
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-setting-title small,
.diagnostics-card .theme-setting-title small,
.settings-card-inline .archive-box-entry small {
  color: var(--panel-body);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-segment {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0;
  margin: 10px 0 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: transparent;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-segment button {
  min-height: 38px;
  border-radius: 0;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 400;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-segment button:last-child {
  border-right: 0;
}

.theme-setting-compact .theme-segment button.is-selected {
  color: var(--panel-invert);
  background: var(--panel-strong);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.settings-card-inline .archive-box-entry {
  min-height: 44px;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 12px 0;
}

.settings-card-inline .archive-box-entry small {
  padding-right: 0;
  color: var(--panel-muted);
}

.ascii-marker {
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  font-weight: 400;
}

.diagnostics-card {
  padding: 0 0 12px;
}

.diagnostics-card + .diagnostics-card {
  margin-top: 0;
}

.diagnostics-card .theme-setting-title {
  padding: 0 0 12px;
}

.diagnostics-card .setting-row input {
  width: 44px;
  height: 28px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: var(--panel-soft);
}

.diagnostics-card .setting-row input::before {
  top: 3px;
  left: 3px;
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background: var(--panel-canvas);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.diagnostics-card .setting-row input:checked {
  background: var(--panel-strong);
}

.diagnostics-card .setting-row input:checked::before {
  transform: translateX(16px);
  background: var(--panel-invert);
}

.settings-view-redesign .settings-version {
  margin-top: 40px;
  padding: 12px 0 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  text-align: left;
}

.archive-hero {
  min-height: auto;
}

.archive-hero-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 4px 0 0;
}

.archive-hero-meta span {
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-line);
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
}

.archive-hero .archive-refresh-button {
  position: static;
  justify-self: start;
  width: auto;
  height: 36px;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-top: 8px;
  padding: 4px 14px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-strong);
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: var(--panel-invert);
  background: var(--panel-strong);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.archive-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0;
  border: 0;
}

.archive-thread-row {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 12px 0;
  text-align: left;
}

.archive-thread-row:hover {
  border-color: var(--panel-line);
  transform: none;
}

.archive-thread-title {
  padding-right: 0;
  color: var(--panel-ink);
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.archive-thread-title::before {
  content: "+ ";
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  font-weight: 400;
}

.archive-thread-row small {
  display: -webkit-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  color: var(--panel-body);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.55;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
}

.archive-thread-meta {
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.archive-page .archive-empty {
  padding: 12px 0;
  color: var(--panel-muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  text-align: left;
}

.archive-page .archive-empty::before {
  content: "- ";
  color: var(--panel-muted);
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .settings-view-redesign,
  .archive-page {
    padding: 24px 16px 48px;
  }

  .settings-hero h2,
  .archive-hero h2 {
    font-size: 26px;
  }

  .settings-card,
  .archive-list-panel,
  .settings-view-redesign .settings-version {
    margin-top: 36px;
  }
}
`;
css = css.replace('/* ===== End drawer redesign 2026 ===== */', `${finalBlock}\n/* ===== End drawer redesign 2026 ===== */`);
fs.writeFileSync(file, css, 'utf8');

import { chromium } from '/Users/xiayanghui/.npm/_npx/e41f203b7505f1fb/node_modules/playwright/index.mjs';
const base = 'http://127.0.0.1:3321';
const paired = await fetch(`${base}/api/pair`, {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({ code: '651726', deviceName: 'Codex visual check' })
}).then((res) => res.json());
if (!paired.token) throw new Error(`pair failed: ${JSON.stringify(paired)}`);
async function capture(theme, suffix) {
  const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true, executablePath: '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' });
  const context = await browser.newContext({ viewport: { width: 511, height: 1046 }, deviceScaleFactor: 1, isMobile: true });
  await context.addInitScript(({ token, theme }) => {
    localStorage.setItem('codexmobile.deviceToken', token);
    localStorage.setItem('codexmobile.theme', theme);
  }, { token: paired.token, theme });
  const page = await context.newPage();
  await page.goto(base, { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
  await page.locator('button[aria-label="打开菜单"], button[aria-label="菜单"], .topbar button').first().click({ timeout: 5000 });
  await page.locator('button[aria-label="设置"]').click({ timeout: 5000 });
  await page.screenshot({ path: `/tmp/codexmobile-settings-${suffix}.png`, fullPage: true });
  await page.getByRole('button', { name: '归档箱 查看已归档线程' }).click({ timeout: 5000 });
  await page.waitForFunction(() => !document.body.innerText.includes('正在同步归档箱') && !document.body.innerText.includes('同步中'), null, { timeout: 30000 }).catch(() => null);
  await page.screenshot({ path: `/tmp/codexmobile-archive-${suffix}.png`, fullPage: true });
  const width = await page.locator('aside.drawer').evaluate((el) => Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().width));
  await browser.close();
  return width;
}
const lightWidth = await capture('light', 'mono-light');
const darkWidth = await capture('dark', 'mono-dark');
console.log(JSON.stringify({ lightWidth, darkWidth, screenshots: ['/tmp/codexmobile-settings-mono-light.png', '/tmp/codexmobile-archive-mono-light.png', '/tmp/codexmobile-settings-mono-dark.png', '/tmp/codexmobile-archive-mono-dark.png'] }, null, 2));
